flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana University-South Bend fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Indiana University-South Bend rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (18.3% → 23.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Indiana University-South Bend rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (54.0% → 65.1%).
